name: Hampshire (United Kingdom)
description: A red over yellow horizontal bicolour bearing a stylised yellow Tudor rose in the upper portion and a yellow crown in the lower.
history: Based on the historic arms of Hampshire (the rose-and-crown emblem of Henry V); the modern flag was adopted by Hampshire County Council and registered with the Flag Institute in 2019.

features.symbolism: the rose of Hampshire, traditionally associated with Henry V
the crown of Henry V, symbol of the historic Kingdom of Wessex's royal seat at Winchester
